_publications._publicationTitle: Sex Is a major determinant of neuronal dysfunction in neurofibromatosis type 1.

_contextSnippet: only Nf1-CKO male mice had reduced hippocampal dopamine levels and DARPP32 phosphorylation compared to controls (Fig 4C, D)
details: Only Nf1-CKO male mice had reduced hippocampal dopamine levels and DARPP32 phosphorylation compared to controls
